grant_title: Public School Opportunities Enhancement Grant Program (HB1402)
geographic_restrictions: Maryland, specifically targeting local school systems and organizations in Baltimore City, Prince George’s County, and other counties with at least 50% of public school students qualifying for free lunch under the National School Lunch Program (e.g., Allegany, Caroline, Cecil, Dorchester, Kent, Somerset, Washington, Wicomico Counties, and The SEED School of Maryland).
project_area: Expanding or creating extended day and summer enhancement programs, establishing educational or recreational partnerships, or supporting existing educational programming during the school day (including teacher recruitment, training, and professional development).
demographic_requirements: Targeted at youth in local school systems and communities with high rates of students qualifying for free lunch under the National School Lunch Program.
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants include local school systems, nonprofit organizations (501(c)(3)), and community schools in specified Maryland counties and Baltimore City. Proposed activities must align with program goals such as expanding educational opportunities, enhancing summer programs, or fostering partnerships.
